HILLO-VOID_ENVOY.title: Void Envoy
HILLO-VOID_ENVOY.description:
#[gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}.
Add a random -card-+[green]upgraded card[/green]+ to your hand; it gains [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold], and costs 0 this turn.
HILLO-ETERNAL_GUARDIAN.title: Eternal Guardian
HILLO-TEMPORAL_DOMINION.title: Temporal Dominion
HILLO-TEMPORAL_DOMINION.description: At the end of each turn, [gold]Osty[/gold] dies and ALL enemies gain [gold]Doom[/gold] equal to {Multiplier:diff()}x [gold]Osty[/gold]'s Max HP.
HILLO-IMPENDING_DOOM.title: Impending Doom
HILLO-IMPENDING_DOOM.description: Enemies' [gold]Doom[/gold] triggers at the end of your turn instead.
HILLO-FLOURISH.title: Flourish
HILLO-FLOURISH.description: If [gold]Osty[/gold] is at full HP: [gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], draw 1 card.
HILLO-GRAVE_CALLER.title: Grave Caller
HILLO-CURSED_ECHO.title: Cursed Echo
HILLO-CURSED_ECHO.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals {OstyDamage:diff()} damage 2 times.
If that enemy has [gold]Doom[/gold], deal the damage to ALL enemies instead.
HILLO-SOUL_RECALL.title: Soul Recall
HILLO-SOUL_RECALL.description: #Put all [gold]Souls[/gold] in your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold]+[green] (Upgraded)[/green]+ into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
HILLO-TERMINAL.title: Terminal
HILLO-TERMINAL.description:
Choose a card in your hand; its [gold]cost[/gold] is reduced by 1 this combat.
Choose a card in your [gold]draw pile[/gold]; its [gold]cost[/gold] is increased by 1 this combat.
HILLO-GLITCH.title: Glitch
HILLO-GLITCH.description:
#Deal {Damage} damage {Times:diff()} times.
Add a -[gold]Repair[/gold]-+[green]Repair/+[/green]+ to your hand.
HILLO-REPAIR.title: Repair
HILLO-REPAIR.description:
#Gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold] {Times:diff()} times.
Add a -[gold]Glitch[/gold]-+[green]Glitch+[/green]+ to your hand.
HILLO-CACHE_CLEAR.title: Cache Clear
HILLO-CACHE_CLEAR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Shuffle your [gold]discard pile[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
Draw 1 card.
HILLO-HAIL.title: Hail
HILLO-HAIL.description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Frost[/gold] Orb.
Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to {Multiplier:diff()}x ({Damage}) the number of [gold]Frost[/gold] Orbs you've [gold]Channeled[/gold] this combat.
HILLO-UMBRAL_INCURSION.title: Umbral Incursion
HILLO-UMBRAL_INCURSION.description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Orb Slot[/gold] and [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Dark[/gold] Orb.
HILLO-ALL_IN.title: All In
HILLO-ALL_IN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 3 times.
Next turn, lose 10 HP.
HILLO-PERFECT_PLAN.title: Perfect Plan
HILLO-PERFECT_PLAN.description:
#All players draw {Draw:diff()} card(s),
gain [E],
gain {Vigor:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold],
gain 1 [gold]Buffer[/gold].
HILLO-MALICE.title: Malice
HILLO-MALICE.description: Whenever you play a card, apply to a random enemy (equal chance) 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], 1 [gold]Weak[/gold], or -1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
HILLO-GRAND_ENCORE.title: Grand Encore
HILLO-GRAND_ENCORE.description:
At the start of your turn, play 1 [gold]Dramatic Entrance[/gold].
At the end of your turn, play all [gold]Dramatic Entrances[/gold] in your exhaust pile.
HILLO-STAR_CONVERSION.title: Star Conversion
HILLO-STAR_CONVERSION.description:
#Whenever you spend [EEE], gain {singleStarIcon}.
Whenever you spend {singleStarIcon}{singleStarIcon}{singleStarIcon}, gain [E].
HILLO-STAR_EXPLODE.title: Star Explode
HILLO-STAR_SWORD.title: Star Sword
HILLO-STAR_SWORD.description: #[gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold]'s cost is reduced by [E] and it costs an additional {singleStarIcon}.
HILLO-SHATTERED_ARMOR.title: Shattered Armor
HILLO-SHATTERED_ARMOR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] again this turn.
HILLO-PRIMED.title: Primed
HILLO-PRIMED.description:
#Apply {Weak:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Next turn, gain [E] and draw 1 card.
HILLO-RETRACE_STRIKE.title: Retrace Strike
HILLO-RETRACE_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose an Attack or Skill in your [gold]discard pile[/gold]; add an [gold]Exhaust[/gold] copy of it to your hand.
HILLO-RECYCLE_DEBRIS.title: Recycle Debris
HILLO-RECYCLE_DEBRIS.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Debris[/gold] in your hand; gain {singleStarIcon} for each.
HILLO-OUT.title: Out!!
HILLO-OUT.description:
#Draw 1 card.
Choose 2 cards in your [gold]hand[/gold]; [gold]transform[/gold] them into 2 random -Minions-+[green]Minions+[/green]+.
HILLO-FEROCIOUS_FORGE.title: Ferocious Forge
HILLO-FEROCIOUS_FORGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Forge[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
Add a [gold]Debris[/gold] to your hand.
HILLO-REVERE.title: Revere
HILLO-MYRIAD_SWORDS.title: Myriad Swords
HILLO-MYRIAD_SWORDS.description:
[gold]Forge[/gold] 15.
At the end of your turn, play all your [gold]Sovereign Blades[/gold], wherever they are.
HILLO-EXPLORER.title: Explorer
HILLO-EXPLORER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Discard up to {Discard:diff()} cards, then draw that many.
HILLO-SLY_FORM.title: Sly Form
HILLO-SLY_FORM.description:
Whenever you discard a card, gain {Agile:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
After all your cards are discarded, they gain [gold]Sly[/gold].
HILLO-TRANSMUTE.title: Transmute
HILLO-TRANSMUTE.description: #Choose any number of cards in your hand; transform them into -[gold]Shivs[/gold]-+[green]Shivs+[/green]+.
HILLO-WIND_WALK.title: Wind Walk
HILLO-WIND_WALK.description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
HILLO-ALCHEMY.title: Alchemy
HILLO-ALCHEMY.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your hand.
Apply {Poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to a random enemy.
HILLO-BACK_STEP.title: Back Step
HILLO-BACK_STEP.description:
Discard 3 cards.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you discarded your entire hand, draw 3 cards.
HILLO-IMPROVISATION.title: Improvisation
HILLO-IMPROVISATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold]; otherwise apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
HILLO-ASSURANCE.title: Assurance
HILLO-ASSURANCE.description: Whenever you play a non-[gold]Sly[/gold] Power card, add a 3-cost copy of it to your discard pile; the copy gains [gold]Sly[/gold].
HILLO-BINARY.title: Binary
HILLO-BINARY.description: Whenever you play a card with an odd Energy cost, draw 1 card.
HILLO-LIGHTNING_TIME.title: Lightning Time
HILLO-CHAIN_LIGHTNING.title: Chain Lightning
HILLO-CHAIN_LIGHTNING.description: [gold]Channel[/gold] 3 [gold]Lightning[/gold] Orbs. Trigger the passive of all [gold]Lightning[/gold] Orbs on ALL enemies {Passive:diff()} times.
